about.title: Who
about.subtitle: A multifaceted reality in the Italian, European and international landscape
about.description1: Founded in the 1980s by Eng. Alfredo C. Cestari, who leads it with more than 20 Italian and foreign offices, Gruppo Cestari has progressively expanded its sphere of activity and today represents a multifaceted reality in the Italian, European and international landscape, thanks to the multiplicity of interests and sectors in which it operates.
about.description2: We offer support services to businesses and public entities in Italy, Europe and beyond, especially in Africa and Latin America, to evaluate the most advantageous financial instrument to realize a project idea and to participate directly in local, national and international tenders.
about.mission: We help businesses, public entities and territories grow sustainably across all countries of the world. The relationships established with international organizations, combined with decades of experience in meeting the needs of both public and private clients, make Gruppo Cestari an indispensable strategic partner.
about.vision: To invest increasingly in renewable energy by creating eco-sustainable plants to combat climate change, preserving the environment, the planet and future generations.
about.bottomText: Leaders in financial consulting, international cooperation and renewable energy

cta.title: Looking to invest in Africa?
cta.subtitle: Gruppo Cestari is the institutional partner of choice for businesses and investors seeking to operate in emerging markets. We are present where opportunities arise.

timeline.todayDesc: 10 companies, 20+ offices in 4 continents, leader in consulting and sustainable development

testimonials.title: Our clients speak
testimonials.subtitle: Discover the experiences of those who chose Gruppo Cestari as their growth partner

testimonial1.name: Marco Rossi
testimonial1.quote: Thanks to Gruppo Cestari's support, we managed to access European funding that allowed us to expand our production capacity by 40%. Top-tier professionalism and competence.

testimonial2.name: Laura Bianchi
testimonial2.quote: Their experience in renewable energy guided us in creating our energy community. A team that truly knows the sector and regulations.

testimonial3.name: Giuseppe Ferrara
testimonial3.quote: We have been collaborating with Gruppo Cestari for over 10 years on our internationalization projects in Africa. Reliable partner and concrete results.

testimonial4.name: Francesca De Luca
testimonial4.quote: The financial consulting we received allowed us to optimize our group structure and access advantageous credit lines. Highly recommended.

hero.title: Our
hero.subtitle: Over four decades of excellence serving businesses, public entities and territories. A multi-sector holding company leader in financial consulting, international cooperation and sustainable development.

founder.name: Eng. Alfredo C.
founder.paragraph1: In the 1980s, Eng. Alfredo C. Cestari founded in Salerno what would become one of the most important Italian holding companies in the field of financial consulting and international cooperation.
founder.paragraph2: With a far-sighted vision and a strong commitment to sustainable development, Gruppo Cestari has grown to become a reference point for businesses, public entities and territories seeking a reliable partner for their growth.
founder.paragraph3: Today the group has 10 companies, 15 offices worldwide and over 500 professionals dedicated to turning challenges into opportunities.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To help businesses, public entities and territories grow sustainably, creating economic and social value through innovative solutions and a multidisciplinary approach that combines financial expertise, international experience and strategic vision.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: To be the reference partner for sustainable growth globally, investing in renewable energy, international cooperation and territorial development to build a better future for future generations.

sustainability.title: Sustainability
sustainability.description: We integrate environmental responsibility into every project.

trust.description: We build lasting relationships based on mutual trust.

timeline.title: 40 years of evolution
timeline.subtitle: Key milestones in our growth journey

origini.title: The origins
origini.description: Gruppo Cestari is born in Salerno in the early 1980s through the initiative of engineer Alfredo Carmine Cestari. Initial activities focus on civil engineering and technical and financial consulting for public entities and territories in Southern Italy.

espansione.title: National expansion
espansione.description: The Group begins a structured growth phase with the opening of offices in Rome, Milan and Naples. This expansion allows it to cover major Italian institutional hubs and manage complex industrial and territorial development projects nationwide.

consolidamento.title: Corporate consolidation
consolidamento.description: Several historic entities of the original nucleus are formalized, including Cestari S.r.l. During these years, Futuro & Programmazione takes shape, a company specialized in strategic planning, subsidized finance and territorial development.

rafforzamento.title: Strengthening competencies
rafforzamento.description: Alfredo Carmine Cestari obtains his degree in Civil Engineering, Land Defense and Territorial Planning. The Group already operates nationally and begins to look beyond Italian borders.

internazionalizzazione.title: Start of internationalization
internazionalizzazione.description: The Group launches its first international cooperation projects, with particular attention to Africa. The vision of exporting Italian know-how in infrastructure, energy and territorial development is born.

africa.title: Africa and institutional dimension
africa.description: The appointment of Alfredo Cestari as Honorary Consul of the Democratic Republic of Congo marks a strategic turning point. The Group strengthens its presence in African countries, expanding operations to Rwanda, Angola, Burundi, Kenya and Gabon.

sistemaPaese.title: Country System and structured cooperation
sistemaPaese.description: ItalAfrica Centrale is born, a Foreign Chamber of Commerce recognized in Italy, founded by Alfredo Carmine Cestari. It represents a strategic tool to accompany Italian companies in African markets.

energia.title: Energy and sustainability
energia.description: Strategic Energy Resources (S.E.R.) is founded, dedicated to renewable energy and energy efficiency. The Group builds wind and photovoltaic parks in Italy, anticipating energy transition themes.

logistica.title: Logistics and aviation in Africa
logistica.description: Emeraude S.a.r.l. is born in Pointe-Noire (Republic of Congo), with air taxi and air logistics activities. The experience lays the foundation for the subsequent development of the Group's aviation sector.

sostenibilita.title: Sustainability and international photovoltaic
sostenibilita.description: The division dedicated exclusively to sustainability is launched. Midday Sun is born, focused on large photovoltaic systems, with particular attention to solar projects in Africa.

aviazione.title: Civil aviation and airport infrastructure
aviazione.description: Winfly airline, founded by Alfredo Cestari, obtains its COA. Winfly operates in civil and executive transport, aeronautical maintenance and airport infrastructure management, including the 'Enrico Mattei' airport in Pisticci.

expo.title: Expo and economic diplomacy
expo.description: Alfredo Cestari is appointed General Commissioner of Burundi for Expo Milano 2015. The Group plays a key role in facilitating the participation of numerous African countries, strengthening the institutional and international dimension of the network.

europa.title: Europe, South America and Expo Milano 2015
europa.description: Expo Milano 2015 represents a moment of strong international visibility for Gruppo Cestari. The Brussels office opens for direct monitoring of EU funds and EU-Africa programs. Cestari Brasil is born, marking the Group's structured entry into South America.

ecosistema.title: Integrated ecosystem
ecosistema.description: The Group consolidates its model as a multi-sector entrepreneurial ecosystem, active in financial consulting, energy, logistics, training and international cooperation.

sudPoloMagnetico.title: Sud Polo Magnetico
sudPoloMagnetico.description: The Sud Polo Magnetico project is launched, identifying Southern Italy as the natural hub between Europe and Africa. Special Economic Zones (SEZs) are recognized as fundamental tools to attract investments and strengthen territorial competitiveness.

zes2022.title: SEZs and investment attraction
zes2022.description: The Group structurally integrates SEZs into its territorial development models. SEZs are used as leverage to accompany Italian and international companies in production localization and industrial development in Southern Italy.

zesPianoMattei.title: SEZs, Mattei Plan and international cooperation
zesPianoMattei.description: SEZs are read systemically and linked to the objectives of the Mattei Plan. The Group helps build cooperation models that connect Italian SEZs and African production chains, promoting sustainable investments and shared industrial development.

zesOggi.title: SEZs as strategic infrastructure
zesOggi.description: SEZs represent one of the Group's positioning pillars. Southern Italy is promoted as an advanced productive, energy and logistics platform, capable of dialoguing with Europe and Africa in a structured and competitive way.

hero.title: Group Companies
hero.subtitle: A network of specialized companies working together to provide complete solutions in consulting, energy, international cooperation and training.

winfly.details: Winfly specializes in strategic consulting for companies looking to grow and innovate. We offer business development, strategic planning and management support services to accompany companies on their development paths, both in Italy and abroad.

strategicEnergy.details: Strategic Energy Resources is a leader in the renewable energy sector. We design and build photovoltaic and wind systems and renewable energy communities, offering consulting for energy efficiency and the transition to a sustainable future.

ied.description: European Institute of Design and training
ied.details: I.E.D. (European Institute for Development) focuses on professional training and skills development. We organize training courses, workshops and capacity building programs for companies, public bodies and professionals.

cestariBrasil.description: Consulting and project development in Brazil
cestariBrasil.details: Cestari Brasil is our operating company in South America. Based in São Paulo, it supports Italian companies looking to expand in the Brazilian and Latin American market, offering local consulting and international project management.

newser1.details: Newser1 is the group's company dedicated to digital innovation and communication. We develop advanced technological solutions, digital platforms and communication strategies for companies and institutions.

futuroProgrammazione.details: Futuro & Programmazione deals with strategic planning and territorial development. We support public and private entities in defining development plans, managing European funds and territorial cooperation projects.

sakti.details: SAKTI operates in the field of international cooperation and sustainable development. We manage projects in Africa, Asia and Latin America, promoting economic and social development of local communities.

wiremena.details: Wiremena specializes in infrastructure and technological networks. We design and build telecommunications networks, IT systems and digital infrastructure for businesses and public administration.

italAfrica.details: ItalAfrica promotes economic and commercial relations between Italy and Africa. We facilitate investments, partnerships and development projects in African countries, with particular attention to renewable energy and sustainable agriculture.

middaySun.description: Solar energy and photovoltaic projects in Africa
middaySun.details: Midday Sun specializes in solar energy projects in Africa. We develop large-scale photovoltaic systems and off-grid systems for rural electrification, contributing to the sustainable development of the African continent.

flywin.details: Flywin offers airport services and integrated logistics solutions. We manage handling services, cargo and airport assistance, supporting national and international air transport operations.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: Information on the processing of personal data pursuant to EU Regulation 2016/679 (GDPR)
privacy.content:
1. Data Controller

The Data Controller is Gruppo Cestari S.r.l., with registered office in Salerno, Italy.

  • Email: privacy@gruppocestari.com
  • Phone: +39 089 952889
  • PEC: gruppocestari@pec.it

2. Types of Data Collected

Among the personal data collected by this website, either independently or through third parties, are: usage data, email, first name, last name, phone number, company name, VAT number and address.

Personal data may be freely provided by the User or, in the case of usage data, collected automatically when using this website.

3. Purpose of Processing

User data is collected for the following purposes:

  • Management of contact and consultation requests
  • Sending commercial communications and newsletters (with prior consent)
  • Management of the reserved area and related services
  • Compliance with legal and tax obligations
  • Aggregate and anonymous statistical analysis

4. Legal Basis for Processing

The processing of personal data is based on:

  • Consent: for sending newsletters and commercial communications
  • Contractual execution: for managing requested services
  • Legal obligation: for tax and regulatory compliance
  • Legitimate interest: for statistical analysis and service improvement

5. Processing Methods

Processing is carried out using IT and/or telematic tools, with organizational and logical methods strictly related to the stated purposes. Adequate technical and organizational security measures are adopted.

6. Data Retention

Personal data will be retained for the time necessary to achieve the purposes for which they are processed and in any case:

  • Contractual data: 10 years from termination of the relationship
  • Tax data: according to legal terms
  • Marketing data: until consent is withdrawn
  • Browsing data: 24 months

7. Data Subject Rights

The User may exercise the following rights:

  • Access: obtain confirmation of processing and a copy of the data
  • Rectification: correct inaccurate or incomplete data
  • Erasure: request deletion of data
  • Restriction: limit processing in certain cases
  • Portability: receive data in structured format
  • Objection: object to processing for legitimate reasons
  • Consent withdrawal: at any time, without affecting the lawfulness of previous processing

To exercise their rights, Users can send a request to privacy@gruppocestari.com.

8. Data Communication and Disclosure

Personal data will not be disclosed. They may be communicated to:

  • Entities providing services for IT system management
  • Professional firms for legal, tax and accounting consultancy
  • Competent authorities for legal compliance

9. Data Transfer

Personal data is processed at the Controller's premises and in the data centers of IT service providers. Data is not transferred outside the European Union.

10. Changes to Privacy Policy

The Controller reserves the right to make changes to this privacy policy at any time, informing Users on this page.

Website Development and Technical Management

This website was built and is managed by:

FODI S.r.l. – Innovative Startup
Via Santicelli 18/A, 88068 Soverato (CZ), Italy
VAT: IT03856160793
Email: info@fodisrl.it
Phone: +39 0963 576433
Web: www.fodisrl.it

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.subtitle: Information on the use of cookies pursuant to EU Regulation 2016/679 (GDPR) and Directive 2002/58/EC
cookies.content:
What are Cookies

Cookies are small text files that websites send to the user's browser, where they are stored, to be retransmitted to the same sites on subsequent visits.

Types of Cookies Used

⚙️

Technical Cookies (Necessary)

Essential for the proper functioning of the site. They include session cookies, authentication and user preferences (such as language). Do not require consent.

📊

Analytics Cookies

Used to collect aggregate information on site usage (pages visited, time spent). Help improve user experience.

🔗

Third-Party Cookies

Cookies installed by external services (e.g. Google Maps, social media). Management is governed by their respective privacy policies.

Technical Cookies Used

NamePurposeDuration
sessionUser session managementSession
localeLanguage preference1 year
cookie-consentStores cookie preferences1 year
themeTheme preference (light/dark)1 year

How to Manage Cookies

Users can manage cookie preferences directly within their browser and prevent third parties from installing them. Browser preferences can also be used to delete previously installed cookies.

Instructions for major browsers:

  • Chrome: Settings → Privacy and security → Cookies and other site data
  • Firefox: Options → Privacy and security → Cookies and site data
  • Safari: Preferences → Privacy → Manage website data
  • Edge: Settings → Cookies and site permissions → Cookies and site data

Consequences of Disabling Cookies

By disabling technical cookies, some site features may not be available or may not work properly. Users may need to log in at each visit and preferences will not be saved.

Updates

This Cookie Policy may be subject to changes. It is recommended to periodically consult this page to check for updates.

Contact

For any questions regarding this Cookie Policy, please contact us:

  • Email: privacy@gruppocestari.com
  • Phone: +39 089 952889

Website Development and Technical Management

This website was built and is managed by:

FODI S.r.l. – Innovative Startup

VAT: IT03856160793
Email: info@fodisrl.it
Phone: +39 0963 576433
Web: www.fodisrl.it

terms.title: Terms and Conditions
terms.subtitle: Terms of use of the Gruppo Cestari website.
terms.content:
1. Purpose

This website is managed by FUTURO & PROGRAMMAZIONE SRL, with registered office in Fisciano (SA), Italy. The site provides information about Gruppo Cestari's activities in financial consulting, international cooperation and sustainable development.

2. Use of the Site

The user agrees to:

  • Use the site lawfully and in accordance with these terms
  • Not spread illegal, offensive or defamatory content
  • Not attempt to access restricted areas without authorization
  • Provide truthful data in contact forms and registration

3. Intellectual Property

All site content (texts, images, logos, videos, graphics) is the property of FUTURO & PROGRAMMAZIONE SRL or their respective owners and is protected by copyright laws. Reproduction, distribution or modification of content without written authorization is prohibited.

4. Account and Registration

Some areas of the site require registration. The user is responsible for the confidentiality of their credentials and all activities carried out with their account.

5. Limitation of Liability

Gruppo Cestari strives to keep site information accurate and up to date, but does not guarantee the completeness or accuracy of the content. The site is provided "as is", without warranties of any kind.

6. Changes to Terms

We reserve the right to modify these Terms and Conditions at any time. Changes will be published on this page.

7. Applicable Law

These Terms and Conditions are governed by Italian law. For any dispute, the Court of Salerno shall have jurisdiction.

Website Development and Technical Management

hero.title: How can we help you?
hero.subtitle: Find answers to the most common questions about our services

q1.question: What is Gruppo Cestari and what does it do?
q1.answer: Gruppo Cestari is a multi-sector holding company founded in 1980, specializing in financial consulting, international cooperation, renewable energy and feasibility studies. With over 10 companies and presence in 4 continents, we support businesses, public entities and territories in their sustainable growth journey.

q2.question: In which countries do you operate?
q2.answer: We operate mainly in Italy with offices in Salerno, Rome, Milan and Naples. Internationally we are present in Europe (Brussels), Africa (various nations including Senegal, Kenya, Mozambique) and Latin America (Brazil). In total we serve clients in over 20 countries.

q3.question: How can I request a consultation?
q3.answer: You can request a free consultation by filling out the form on our Contact or Consultation page. One of our experts will contact you within 24 business hours to discuss your needs and propose the most suitable solutions.

q4.question: What financial consulting services do you offer?
q4.answer: We offer consulting for access to public and private financing, bankability analysis, financial operation structuring, business planning and technical-economic feasibility studies. We support companies from opportunity identification to funding disbursement.

q5.question: Do you offer training services?
q5.answer: Yes, through our specialized companies we offer training programs on subsidized finance, EU project design, international project management and sustainable development. Courses are available both in-person and online, customizable to specific needs.

q6.question: How can I know if my company is eligible for a grant?
q6.answer: Each grant has specific requirements that we carefully verify during the free pre-analysis phase. We evaluate company size, sector, location, economic-financial situation and type of planned investment to determine eligibility.

q7.question: How long does it take to obtain funding?
q7.answer: Timing varies based on the type of grant: regional contributions generally take 3-6 months, national grants 6-12 months, European projects 12-18 months. Throughout the process we keep you constantly updated on the application status.

q8.question: What are Renewable Energy Communities (REC)?
q8.answer: RECs are forms of aggregation between citizens, businesses, public entities and commercial activities that decide to join together to produce, consume and share energy from renewable sources. We offer complete support from establishment to operational management.

q9.question: What are the benefits of photovoltaic systems for businesses?
q9.answer: Businesses benefit from energy cost reduction up to 70%, tax incentives, improved corporate image in ESG terms, energy independence and property enhancement. We offer turnkey solutions with financing included.

q10.question: How do international cooperation projects work?
q10.answer: Cooperation projects involve partnerships between Italian organizations and developing countries, mainly financed by EU funds, AICS or international bodies. We handle design, partner research, management and reporting, with particular focus on Africa and Latin America.
